description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the archlinux/archlinux:base-devel Docker image and a global before_script that installs go, wget, unzip, and docker via pacman, creates a src directory, enables extglob, moves all files except src and go into src, and cd into src. Define stages cache-mod, test, build, and build-plugins, set GOPATH to $CI_PROJECT_DIR/go and a cache keyed by $CI_COMMIT_SHA for $CI_PROJECT_DIR/go/pkg/mod. Add a build-docker job in the build stage that runs only on tags, uses the docker:dind service with DOCKER_HOST tcp://docker:2375 and disables TLS, runs the before_script then creates $CI_PROJECT_DIR/goblog, appends a sqlite driver import, runs go mod tidy, builds the binary with go build -ldflags "-s -w" -trimpath -o $CI_PROJECT_DIR/goblog/goblog, copies and edits config.default.json to use sqlite3 and password "123", downloads the web UI zip, unzips it, moves it to goblog/web, copies Dockerfile, logs into registry.gitlab.com with CI_JOB_TOKEN, builds and pushes the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/xiayesuifeng/goblog:latest. Add a build-goblog job in the build stage that runs only on tags, runs the before_script then creates $CI_PROJECT_DIR/goblog, builds the binary with go build -ldflags "-s -w" -trimpath -o $CI_PROJECT_DIR/goblog/goblog, copies config.default.json, downloads and extracts the web UI, and stores the $CI_PROJECT_DIR/goblog directory as an artifact. Add a cache-mod job in the cache-mod stage that runs only on tags, runs the before_script then executes go get ./..., and saves $CI_PROJECT_DIR/go/pkg/mod as an artifact. Add a test job in the test stage that runs for non‑tag commits, runs the before_script then runs go build, and uses an empty cache. Finally, add a build-plugins job in the build-plugins stage that runs only on tags and triggers the xiayesuifeng/goblog-plugins downstream pipeline.
